{{Quote|This is Colonel Panaka. Why are you using Sgt. Willoc's comm? I haven't heard from him in over a week. Report to me immediately, please.|[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Quarsh Panaka/Legends|Panaka]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:TTo" />}}
'''Willoc''' was a [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]] [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was tasked to investigate the [[Old war bunker]], situated just outside [[Kaadara]], that was overran by the [[Skaak Tippers]]. However, Sergeant Willoc went missing during his mission and a spacer eventually found his [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] in the bunker.<ref name="SWG:TTo" />

==Behind the scenes==
Willoc was first mentioned in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:TTo" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Willoc was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:Legacy Quest|Legacy Quest]]" with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]", a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
